description: As the Operations Manager overseeing a manufacturing company's office consolidation, relocate all hardware assets from the London Office to the New York Office. All transferred assets must be checked in, have their default locations updated to the New York Office, and include the note 'RELOCATED: London Office closure - transferred to NYC per directive OM-2025-031'. Additionally, create two new assets at the New York Office: (1) Asset tag 'ASSET-D004', name 'Dell OptiPlex 7010 - NYC Expansion', model 'Dell OptiPlex 7010', status 'Ready to Deploy', serial 'DOPT7010-NYC-EXP1', purchase cost $899.99, warranty 36 months, purchase date '2025-03-01'; (2) Asset tag 'ASSET-M004', name 'Dell U2723QE Monitor - NYC Expansion', model 'Dell U2723QE 27in 4K', status 'Ready to Deploy', serial 'DMON-NYC-EXP1', purchase cost $549.99, warranty 36 months, purchase date '2025-03-01'.
